edgeCases: Missing/malformed source artifact: capture warns to stderr and returns without writing entries; never blocks complete (SC-04/06/07).
Idempotent capture via content-hash filenames + O_EXCL write-if-absent; concurrent worktree writes are per-entry files (SC-05/13).
Empty ledger or memory disabled: Recall returns nil, no memory block injected, no error (SC-10/12).
Recall caps by recall_max_entries and recall_max_bytes after deterministic ranking (SC-08/11).
summary: Implemented governed project-memory ledger: domain package internal/memory plus config gate, thin capture wiring in complete.go, plan-advisor recall injection, and pure UI memory render block. go build and go vet clean; all files <=100 lines.
